top_signals.title: Washington's Plan to Neutralize Iran’s Hormuz Leverage
top_signals.summary: For decades, Iran has relied on the Strait of Hormuz as its most effective geopolitical weapon -- a crucial energy chokepoint through which up to a third of the world’s oil is transported and about a fifth of its liquefied natural gas (LNG). Tehran’s immediate blockade of the transit route at the onset of the 28 February U.S./Israeli joint military operation against Iran prompted a cessation of maritime traffic through the chokepoint, catalysing a spike in oil prices of over 70%. The prospect of such a blockade continuing into the U.S.’s…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bank of England appoints Rhys Phillips as the new Chief Cashier
top_signals.summary: The Governor of the Bank of England, Andrew Bailey, has announced that Rhys Phillips will be the next Chief Cashier and Director of Notes. He will take up the role on 19 October 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Keel jumps 10% after former bitcoin miner hires data center veteran as president
top_signals.summary: Former Digital Realty executive Ganesh Aiyer will lead Keel's commercial growth and power pipeline expansion.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Waller, Two Thoughts on the Transmission of Monetary Policy
top_signals.summary: Speech At "Challenges for Monetary Policy Transmission in a Changing World," a conference sponsored by the Bank of Italy for the research network initiated by the European System of Central Banks, Rome, Italy

top_signals.title: Japan's Aeon prioritizes Vietnam, targets tripling malls to 30
Victims mourned 8 years after western Japan rain disaster
top_signals.summary: Residents across the Chugoku region on Monday mourned over 300 people who lost their lives in the incident that hit the area in 2018.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

European Commission Speech Brussels, 02 Jul 2026 Ladies and gentlemen,
Let me welcome you to this year's Annual Budget Conference.

top_signals.title: Metered electricity demand in the New York ISO falls midday because of small-scale solar
top_signals.summary: An increase in electricity generation from small-scale solar in New York has decreased the midday demand for metered electricity, amid overall declining load in the state. The trend is particularly notable in the early spring (March and April), when solar generation has an outsized impact because demand is relatively low and conditions for solar generation are favorable.

alerts.title: Metered electricity demand in the New York ISO falls midday because of small-scale solar
alerts.summary: An increase in electricity generation from small-scale solar in New York has decreased the midday demand for metered electricity, amid overall declining load in the state. The trend is particularly notable in the early spring (March and April), when solar generation has an outsized impact because demand is relatively low and conditions for solar generation are favorable.
